metadata.name: Commander dies — owner chooses to return to command zone (CR 903.9a)
metadata.description: p1's commander (Llanowar Elves, 1/1) is on the battlefield. p2 casts Lightning Bolt targeting the commander, dealing 3 damage. SBA triggers (704.5g): commander has lethal damage, moves to graveyard. The commander zone-return SBA (CR 903.9a) then emits a choice event — the owner may return the commander to the command zone. p1 sends ReturnCommanderToCommandZone. Asserts the commander is NOT in p1's graveyard and NOT on the battlefield.
metadata.generation_notes: Updated for MR-M9-01 fix: SBA now emits CommanderZoneReturnChoiceRequired instead of auto-returning. The script adds a return_commander_to_command_zone player action after the SBA check. Negative evidence assertion (not in graveyard) remains valid after the choice is resolved.

script.step_note: p2 casts Lightning Bolt to kill p1's commander; SBA emits choice; p1 returns commander to command zone

actions.description: Initial: Llanowar Elves (commander) on p1's battlefield

actions.note: CR 601.2: p2 casts Lightning Bolt targeting p1's commander (Llanowar Elves, 1/1).
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Lightning Bolt resolves.

resolution.note: CR 120.3: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to Llanowar Elves (1/1 commander). 3 >= 1 toughness — lethal.

actions.note: Lightning Bolt resolves; commander takes lethal damage.

results.description: Llanowar Elves has marked damage 3 >= toughness 1 — moves to graveyard. Commander zone-return SBA (CR 903.9a) emits CommanderZoneReturnChoiceRequired: owner may return to command zone.

actions.note: CR 903.9a: Commander in graveyard — owner must choose whether to return to command zone.
CR 903.9a: p1 chooses to return commander to command zone.

actions.description: After SBA + choice: commander NOT in graveyard and NOT on battlefield (went to command zone)
actions.note: CR 903.9a: Commander returned to command zone by owner's choice. NOT in graveyard (negative evidence; harness has no zones.command_zone assertion path).
